data.title: Solana exchange advises users to withdraw liquidity amid concerns of North Korean hacking, following allegations against a former executive.
data.description: After allegations surfaced that a former executive of a decentralized exchange on the Solana blockchain was involved in hacking activities linked to North Korea, the exchange advised its users to withdraw their funds promptly. This move came amidst growing concerns about cybersecurity and the safety of assets on the platform. Users were urged to take immediate action, with approximately X number of users potentially affected and Y amount of funds at risk. The exchange emphasized the importance of heightened security measures and vigilance in such situations.

data.title: Aehr Test Systems Posts Mixed Quarterly Report, Raises Bookings Outlook
data.description: For its fiscal third quarter, Aehr Test Systems saw a combination of positive and negative results. The company reported robust bookings, which exceed market expectations. Despite this, the stock experienced a decline in after-hours trading. Aehr Test Systems posted its performance update without specifying the exact figures, with the entire report indicating a rise in net bookings for the foreseeable future.

data.title: No. 1 Ranked Hospital Operator Tenet Healthcare Rising Toward Another Record High?
data.description: Tenet Healthcare has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. This upgrade raises questions about the potential for the stock to continue its upward trend. As a leading hospital operator, Tenet Healthcare is now approaching a potential record high, sparking investor interest in its future trajectory.

data.title: Servpac offers Microsoft Azure Local to Hawaiʻi Government, Education & Businesses - a First for Hawai'i
data.description: Servpac, a locally-owned company based in Mililani, Hawaii, revealed on April 7, 2026, that it is now providing Microsoft Azure Local to government, education, and businesses in Hawaii. This move enables organizations across the islands to utilize Azure's cloud services while ensuring that data is stored locally in Hawaii. This initiative aims to better serve the community and meet the increasing demand for secure and efficient cloud solutions.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Whipsaw Into Trump's Iran War Deadline; Apple, Tesla Slump
data.description: Following fluctuating activity, the stock market concluded with slight variations as traders awaited President Trump's Iran War decision by 8 p.m. Eastern Time. Dow Jones Futures experienced volatility as stocks reacted to the impending deadline, resulting in decreases for prominent companies like Apple and Tesla. The market's mixed closure reflected the uncertainty surrounding the situation.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Close Mixed As Critical Iran Deadline Nears (Live Coverage)
data.description: Before the looming deadline set by Trump regarding the Strait of Hormuz, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline. Particularly, Apple stock also saw a decrease. Today's stock market closure presented a mixed picture, with the Dow and S&P 500 ending in different directions. This market movement comes as the critical deadline for Iran approaches. This information was covered live.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Maruchan/
data.description: Correction to previously released information: Maruchan recently welcomed festival attendees in Cabazon to an engaging pop-up experience. This news was initially shared on 25-Mar-2026 via PR Newswire. Please find the updated details below.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to OBX 2026-INV2 Trust
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 64 classes of mortgage pass-through notes from OBX 2026-INV2 Trust. This prime RMBS transaction is backed by agency-eligible investment properties (73.0%) and second homes (27.0%), which are non-owner occupied or “NOO” properties. The collateral includes 1,040 30-year fixed-rate mortgages with an aggregate unpaid principal balance of around $383.8 million as of the April 1, 2026, cut-off date. PennyM is involved in this transaction.

data.title: TrueRoll Emerges as the First AI-Powered System of Action for Tax Assessment Offices
data.description: A technology company, TrueRoll, based in Chicago, has unveiled a major update to its platform designed for property tax assessment offices. Originally concentrated on homestead management, the company has transformed into an AI-driven system that streamlines all document-related processes for tax assessment offices. TrueRoll's CEO, Tyler Maste, highlighted the company's origin story, emphasizing their goal to simplify the operations of tax assessment offices.

data.title: Sherritt Announces Closing of Non‑Brokered Private Placement
data.description: Toronto-based Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement of common shares, raising around $43.5 million. The private placement involved issuing approximately 207 million common shares from the corporation's treasury at a price of $0.21 per share. This transaction is part of the Corporation's strategic financial initiatives.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund Announces April 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 7, 2026, Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) declared a monthly distribution of $0.10 per unit for April 2026. Shareholders recorded on April 22, 2026, are set to receive the distributions on May 15, 2026.

data.title: DOJ under Trump administration denies Tornado Cash developer's appeal for dismissal, citing Supreme Court ruling.
data.description: Prosecutors have stated that the upcoming retrial of Roman Storm, the developer of Tornado Cash, will not be impacted by a recent Supreme Court decision. Storm's case will proceed regardless of the ruling.

data.title: COSCIENS Comments on Unusual Market Activity
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario on April 7, 2026, COSCIENS Biopharma Inc. (TSX: CSCI) (OTCQB: CSCIF) addressed recent market activity by releasing a statement. The company, known as COSCIENS, typically refrains from discussing market movements or speculation. However, they clarified that they have no significant undisclosed information that could explain the recent surge in trading volume and share price of their common stock.

data.title: Home BancShares, Inc. Ranked #2 on S&P Global Market Intelligence’s Top 50 U.S. Public Banks for 2025
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Conway, Arkansas, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), the parent company of Centennial Bank, revealed that it secured the 2nd position on S&P Global Market Intelligence’s Top 50 U.S. Public Banks list for 2025. This ranking is specifically for banks with over $10 billion in total assets.
